name: Onboarding Transcript to AI Agent Configuration v2

options.systemMessage: You are a business information extraction specialist. Analyze the onboarding call transcript and extract structured information about the company, services, emergency definitions, business hours, routing rules, and integration constraints. Be thorough and accurate.

nodes.name: Merge and Build Updated Account Memo

options.systemMessage: You are an AI agent configuration specialist. Generate a complete agent_spec JSON based on the provided account memo. Include agent_name, version (v2), system_prompt, key variables, and routing rules. Make the system prompt comprehensive and actionable.

You are a changelog generator. Compare the v1 and v2 account memos and create a detailed changelog describing what changed between versions. Be specific about updates to business hours, services, routing rules, and other fields.

main.node: Merge and Build Updated Account Memo
